title: Radical Rick Self-Portrait for NoWear BMX — 1 of 45
source_title: Radical Rick Self Portrait 1 of 45 for Nowhere BMX
edition_display: One unique portrait in a group of 45
alt: Small hand-painted Radical Rick portrait on a green and blue background, signed Damian and marked Hang Rad.
summary: Original hand-painted mini portrait of Radical Rick created by artist Damian Fulton for the 2024 NoWear BMX Compound fundraiser. Produced to commemorate the 45th anniversary of the character, each portrait is unique and part of a limited run of 45 pieces worldwide. The artwork is hand-signed by Fulton and features the embossed “Certified Radical” seal verifying authenticity.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: The original source title spells the organization “Nowhere BMX”; the inventory description uses “NoWear BMX Compound.” Both forms are preserved as a known wording discrepancy.
details: Produced for the 2024 NoWear BMX Compound fundraiser according to the inventory.
Signed by Damian Fulton and marked with the Certified Radical seal according to the inventory.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
